title: Gurgaon Metro Expansion Approved
summary: Government has approved a new metro corridor connecting Old Gurgaon to Cyber City to reduce traffic congestion.

title: India Startup Funding Rises
summary: Indian startups saw a 25% increase in funding this quarter driven by fintech and AI sectors.

title: Global AI Race Accelerates
summary: Major tech companies are investing billions into AI infrastructure as the global competition intensifies.
